transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-15]
[00:00] You: Let's run our retrospective for sprint 22. What went well?
[00:30] Speaker 1: The deployment pipeline was rock solid this sprint. Zero failed deploys.
[01:00] Speaker 2: Agreed. The new staging environment really helped catch issues early.
[01:30] Speaker 3: I'd say the pair programming sessions on the auth refactor worked well too.
[02:00] You: Great. What could have gone better?
[02:20] Speaker 1: Our standups were running long. We need to be more disciplined about keeping them to 15 minutes.
[02:50] Speaker 2: The sprint backlog wasn't fully groomed going in. We lost a day early in the sprint figuring out scope.
[03:30] Speaker 3: I agree. We also had some blockers that weren't surfaced early enough.
[04:00] You: Okay. What are our action items? Speaker 2, can you own the backlog grooming before the next sprint?
[04:20] Speaker 2: Yes, I'll groom the backlog by June 19th so we're ready for sprint 23 planning.
[04:45] Speaker 1: I'll put together a standup facilitation guide to help keep us on track. I'll have it done by Wednesday, June 17th.
[05:15] Speaker 3: I'll add a 'blockers' section to our daily standup template so issues get surfaced earlier. I'll update it today.
[05:45] You: Perfect. Let's also do a retro on the retro itself — Speaker 1, can you send a quick survey after today's meeting to get async feedback?
[06:00] Speaker 1: Sure, I'll send the survey out by end of day.
[06:20] You: Good. We're shipping sprint 23 on June 30th, so let's make sure we're set up for success.

action_items.description: Groom sprint 23 backlog before sprint planning
action_items.source_quote: I'll groom the backlog by June 19th so we're ready for sprint 23 planning.

action_items.description: Create standup facilitation guide to keep standups to 15 minutes
action_items.source_quote: I'll put together a standup facilitation guide to help keep us on track. I'll have it done by Wednesday, June 17th.

action_items.description: Add blockers section to daily standup template
action_items.source_quote: I'll add a 'blockers' section to our daily standup template so issues get surfaced earlier. I'll update it today.

action_items.description: Send async retro feedback survey to the team
action_items.source_quote: I'll send the survey out by end of day.

decisions: Standups should be kept to 15 minutes maximum
Backlog must be fully groomed before sprint planning begins
